case_title: MABALOT, ALFREDO VS EASTON MORTGAGE CORP., EASTON, RICHARD II, PRES.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MABALOT, ALFREDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EASTON MORTGAGE CORP., EASTON, RICHARD II, PRES. CONSOLIDATED W/ 780016 FOR PURPOSES OF JUDGMENT. SEE JUDGMENT IN CASE NO. 780016. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,268.00 FILED BY MABALOT, ALFREDO AS TO DEFENDANT EASTON MORTGAGE CORP., EASTON, RICHARD II, PRES. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EASTON MORTGAGE CORP., EASTON, RICHARD II, PRES.
